series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting support services provided to specific data processing equipment or installations including site visit reports, program & equipment service reports, service histories & correspondence & memoranda.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain site visit reports, problem & equipment service reports & routine correspondence & memoranda until warranty or guarantee of service has expired, then destroy. Retain service histories & other summary records until the related equipment is no longer in use., Paper: Shred
